name: collapse
description: Jared Diamond's Collapse — historical and environmental toolkit exploring why societies fail or succeed, examining past collapses from Easter Island to the Maya, and drawing lessons for our civilization
useCase: Understand Diamond's five-point collapse framework, learn from past societal collapses, analyze modern environmental challenges, and apply lessons to avoid our own collapse
knownRisks: Diamond's framework has been criticized by some historians as overly deterministic
The case studies simplify complex historical events — specialists may disagree with specific interpretations
The book was published in 2004 — some data on modern cases may be outdated
